queries.question: What facilities are found on all of the cruise ships?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.facilityName  from Cruise_Ships_Facilities join Facilities on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Cruise_Ships on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId = Cruise_Ships.id   GROUP BY Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Cruise_Ships)

queries.question: Which facilities are common to among all cruise ships and what are their statuses?
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.facilityName, Facilities.isAvailable  from Cruise_Ships_Facilities join Facilities on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Cruise_Ships on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId = Cruise_Ships.id   GROUP BY Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Cruise_Ships)

queries.question: List the availability status of the facilities that are common to all cruise ships.
queries.sql: SELECT Facilities.isAvailable  from Cruise_Ships_Facilities join Facilities on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Cruise_Ships on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId = Cruise_Ships.id   GROUP BY Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Cruise_Ships)

queries.question: For each cruise shop, list the facilities it has
queries.sql: select cruise_ships.name , facilities.facilityname from Cruise_Ships_Facilities join Facilities on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Cruise_Ships on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId = Cruise_Ships.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?facilityname WHERE {
  ?cruise_ships_facilities a :Cruise_Ships_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facilities .
  ?cruise_ships_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?cruise_ships a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?cruise_ships_facilities p:hasCruise_Ships ?cruise_ships .
  ?cruise_ships p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:facilityName ?facilityname .
}

queries.question: For each cruise ship, list the availability status of the facilities.
queries.sql: select cruise_ships.name , facilities.isavailable from Cruise_Ships_Facilities join Facilities on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Cruise_Ships on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId = Cruise_Ships.id

queries.question: For each cruise ship, show the facilities and their statuses.
queries.sql: select cruise_ships.name , facilities.facilityname , facilities.isavailable from Cruise_Ships_Facilities join Facilities on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.facilityId = Facilities.id join Cruise_Ships on Cruise_Ships_Facilities.cruiseShipId = Cruise_Ships.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?facilityname ?isavailable WHERE {
  ?cruise_ships_facilities a :Cruise_Ships_Facilities .
  ?facilities a :Facilities .
  ?cruise_ships_facilities p:hasFacilities ?facilities .
  ?cruise_ships a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?cruise_ships_facilities p:hasCruise_Ships ?cruise_ships .
  ?cruise_ships p:name ?name .
  ?facilities p:facilityName ?facilityname .
  ?facilities p:isAvailable ?isavailable .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What facilities do we have for each cruise ship?
Give me the facilities and their statuses on all cruise ships.
List the availability status of the facilities built on every cruise ship.
